allow: PowerShell($c = Get-Command chromium-cli -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.Source } else { "no chromium-cli" }; $p = Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "python: " + $p.Source } else { "no python" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.js','.html','.css' } | Select-Object FullName, @{N='Lines';E={\(Get-Content $_.FullName | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines}} | Sort-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; node --check js/audio.js; if \($?\) { "audio.js OK" }; node --check js/game.js; if \($?\) { "game.js OK" })
